description: Authenticating a workload with a downloaded service-account JSON key that then leaks.
body: Failure mode: a team exports a service-account key, commits or bakes it into an image, and the long-lived credential leaks or never rotates. Detection signals: serviceAccountKeys listing user-managed keys, a JSON key in source control or a container layer, and audit logs showing the key used from unexpected locations. Do not download service-account keys for workloads that run on GCP. Safer fallback: use Workload Identity (GKE) or the runtime service account (Cloud Run/Functions) so credentials are short-lived and never exported, and delete any existing user-managed keys.
